summary: Iteration 109 - Testing 5 New Features: Multi-Agent Orchestration, Fine-Tuning Pipeline, Marketplace Reviews, Webhooks, Agent Benchmarks. All 42 backend API tests passed (100%). All 5 frontend panels render correctly.

minor.issue: Returns 404 instead of expected route - actual route is /api/workspaces/{ws_id}/agents

issues: Shows 'No agents in this workspace' when workspace has no agents - working as expected
Shows 'No agents in this workspace' when workspace has no agents - working as expected

critical_code_review_comments: All 5 new route modules properly registered in server.py (lines 1466-1480)
Orchestration supports sequential and parallel execution modes with condition-based branching
Fine-tuning uses real Claude AI via Emergent LLM key for dataset evaluation and prompt optimization
Webhooks support 16 event types with automatic disabling after 10 consecutive failures
Benchmarks measure retrieval_score, keyword_score, and topic_score with pass/fail determination
Reviews include rating breakdown aggregation and helpful/flag functionality
All frontend components have proper data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: Test agents, orchestrations, webhooks, datasets, benchmark suites created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 109 features verified: 1) Multi-Agent Orchestration - Create orchestrations with sequential/parallel modes, run with input text, view step results. Works correctly. 2) Fine-Tuning Pipeline - Create datasets from agent knowledge, start fine-tune jobs that use Claude AI for evaluation and prompt optimization, apply optimized prompts to agents. 3) Webhooks - Create webhooks with event subscriptions, toggle enable/disable, test webhooks, view delivery logs. 4) Benchmarks - Create test suites with cases, run benchmarks that measure retrieval/keyword/topic scores, view detailed results. 5) Reviews - Create/update/delete reviews on marketplace templates, mark helpful, flag inappropriate reviews, view rating breakdown. All APIs use cookie-based auth (session_token). The frontend uses /api/workspaces/{ws_id}/agents for Nexus agents (not /nexus-agents).

mocked_apis.note: Fine-tuning uses real Claude AI via Emergent LLM key for dataset evaluation and prompt optimization
